Title: Add to Cart - From Product Page
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in, product available and in stock, on product detail page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{TEST_SKU}}
[ASSERT] verify 'Add to Cart' button is visible and enabled
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] wait for success notification to appear
[ASSERT] verify cart badge count incremented
Assertions:
[DOM] success notification message visible
[DOM] cart badge count incremented by 1
[STATE] product appears in cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItem mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors after add-to-cart click
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart API requests
Failure_Signals: cart badge stuck at 0; success notification never appears; 'Add to Cart' button stays in loading state

[WAIT] wait for cart badge to update

[STATE] product appears in cart mini-cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItem mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart update requests
Failure_Signals: page redirects to PDP unexpectedly; cart badge does not update; quick-add button not visible on hover

Title: Cart Calculations - Subtotal
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Multiple items in cart with different quantities, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] record unit price and quantity for each line item
[ASSERT] calculate expected subtotal: sum of (unit price × qty) for all lines
[ASSERT] compare expected subtotal to displayed subtotal
[ACT] change one item quantity
[WAIT] wait for totals to recalculate
[ASSERT] verify subtotal updated correctly
Assertions:
[MATH] each line total = unit price × quantity (2 decimal places)
[MATH] displayed subtotal = sum of all line totals (2 decimal places)
[MATH] subtotal updates immediately after quantity change
[FORMAT] all amounts formatted as currency with 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart recalculation requests
Failure_Signals: subtotal does not match sum of line totals; rounding error > $0.01; subtotal not updating after quantity change

Title: Quantity Stepper - Max Stock Enforcement
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
SEED REQUIRED: Product with stock ≤ 10 must exist in catalog and virtual B2B catalog ({{LOW_STOCK_SKU}}). Set LOW_STOCK_SKU env var. Run /qa-seed-data to provision. Product available; qty=0 in cart (not yet added).
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{LOW_STOCK_SKU}}
[ACT] click '+' (Increase quantity) repeatedly until reaching max stock (5)
[ASSERT] observe 'Increase quantity' button state at max stock
[ACT] attempt to click '+' (Increase quantity) one more time
[ASSERT] verify qty does not exceed 5
[ACT] click spinbutton and type '99999'
[KEY] press Tab
[ASSERT] verify qty capped at max stock or error shown
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Increase quantity' button disabled at max stock (≤ 10)
[STATE] additional '+' clicks have no effect beyond max stock
[STATE] direct input of 99999 capped at available stock or validation error shown
[STATE] cart quantity never exceeds available inventory
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] changeCartItemQuantity mutation response errors[] is empty (valid calls); stock constraint returned for over-max attempts
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: '+' button active beyond max stock; qty exceeds inventory in cart; 99999 accepted and submitted without cap
Automation_Status: Manual — BLOCKED pending seed: low-stock SKU ({{LOW_STOCK_SKU}} with stock ≤ 10). SEED verdict 2026-04-21.

Title: Currency Switch - Cart Prices Recalculate Using New Price List
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in; products in cart with prices in multiple currencies; store supports at least two currencies (e.g., USD and EUR)
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and add 2-3 products to cart
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] note all unit prices, line totals, subtotal, shipping, and tax in current currency (e.g., USD)
[ACT] locate currency selector (header or footer)
[ACT] switch currency to EUR (or second supported currency)
[WAIT] wait for cart page to reload/recalculate
[ASSERT] verify all unit prices updated to EUR price list values (not just USD converted)
[ASSERT] verify line totals recalculated
[ASSERT] verify subtotal, shipping, and tax all display in EUR
Assertions:
[DOM] currency symbol changes from $ to EUR/other on all price elements
[MATH] each line total = new currency unit price x quantity (2 decimal places)
[MATH] subtotal = sum of all line totals in new currency
[STATE] prices reflect new currency's price list (not a simple exchange rate conversion)
[FORMAT] all monetary values display correct currency symbol
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart query returns prices in new currency after switch
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on currency switch request
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during currency recalculation
Failure_Signals: prices still show old currency after switch; line totals not recalculated; subtotal mismatch; currency symbol not updated; shipping/tax still in old currency
Cleanup: Switch currency back to original; remove items from cart

Title: Currency Switch - Product Without Price in New Currency Flagged
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in; cart contains at least one product that has no price defined in the target currency; store supports multiple currencies
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and add products to cart including one product known to lack a price in the target currency
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify all items display with valid prices in current currency
[ACT] switch currency to target currency where one product has no price
[WAIT] wait for cart to recalculate
[ASSERT] verify product without price is flagged with warning or removed from cart
[ASSERT] verify remaining products display correct prices in new currency
[ASSERT] verify cart totals only include valid items
Assertions:
[DOM] product without new-currency price shows warning message or is removed
[STATE] cart does not display $0.00 or blank price for the missing-price product
[DOM] remaining items show correct new-currency prices
[MATH] subtotal excludes flagged/removed item
[STATE] checkout blocked if flagged item remains in cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart query returns validation warning for product without price in new currency
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during currency switch
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: product shows $0.00 price instead of warning; no indication of missing price; cart totals include zero-price item; checkout proceeds with invalid pricing
Cleanup: Switch currency back to original; remove items from cart

Title: Cart Isolation - Org A Items Not Visible in Org B Cart
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
SEED REQUIRED: User who is a member of TWO separate B2B organizations simultaneously (e.g., both TechFlow and BuildRight). Set {{MULTI_ORG_USER_EMAIL}} and {{MULTI_ORG_USER_PASSWORD}}. Standard {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}} belongs to only one org — this user is insufficient.
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] ensure current organization context is Org A

Title: Pack Size Enforcement - Quantity Stepper Increments by Pack Size
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
SEED REQUIRED: Product with pack size / MOQ configured (pack size = 6) must exist in catalog and B2B virtual catalog. Set {{PACK_SIZE_SKU}} env var. Admin step: set product MinQuantity = 6, PackSize = 6 in product properties. User logged in.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{PACK_SIZE_SKU}}
[ASSERT] verify product detail page loads with pack size information visible (e.g., 'Sold in packs of 6')
[ACT] click '+' (Increase quantity) button
[WAIT] wait for quantity to update
[ASSERT] verify spinbutton shows pack size value (e.g., 6) not 1
[ACT] click '+' again
[ASSERT] verify quantity increments by pack size (e.g., 6 → 12)
[ACT] click '-' (Decrease quantity) once
[ASSERT] verify quantity decrements by pack size (e.g., 12 → 6)
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify cart line item quantity is a multiple of pack size
Assertions:
[DOM] initial increment sets quantity to pack size (6), not 1
[DOM] each subsequent '+' click adds pack size (6 → 12 → 18)
[DOM] each '-' click decrements by pack size (18 → 12 → 6)
[STATE] cart quantity is always a multiple of pack size
[MATH] line total = unit price x quantity (where qty is multiple of pack size)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItem or changeCartItemQuantity mutation enforces pack size multiples
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: stepper increments by 1 instead of pack size; quantity not a multiple of pack size in cart; no pack size info on PDP
Automation_Status: Manual — BLOCKED pending seed: pack-size product ({{PACK_SIZE_SKU}} with MOQ=6). SEED verdict 2026-04-21.

User logged in. Cart has at least 1 item. Two valid coupon codes available: QA10OFF and SUPER (or any second valid code). Both are applicable to the cart. Theme 2.48.0-pr-2269-cd06 or later deployed. Design Technique: Decision Table (one coupon active + apply second).

[ACT] apply QA10OFF (via preset card or custom code card)

[ACT] now apply SUPER (via its preset card apply button, or via Custom code card with typed code)

[ASSERT] SUPER card shows applied state
[ASSERT] QA10OFF card returns to default state (not applied)
[SCROLL] scroll up to OrderSummary

[DOM] QA10OFF card: default state (dashed border, arrow-right apply button — not applied)

[DOM] OrderSummary discount line reflects SUPER discount only (not stacked)

[ACT] navigate to Stores > [store] > Settings and locate 'checkout_coupon_enabled' (or equivalent feature flag)
[ACT] set checkout_coupon_enabled = false (disabled)
[SAVE] save the store setting
[WAIT] 5s for propagation
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads with at least 1 item
[SCROLL] to right sidebar below OrderSummary
[ASSERT] observe whether 'Discount & coupons' widget (.coupons-section) is visible or hidden
[ACT] restore checkout_coupon_enabled = true (re-enable) after observation
[SAVE] save restored setting
Assertions:
[DOM] EXPECTED (per VCST-4896 PR behavior): 'Discount & coupons' widget (.coupons-section) is STILL VISIBLE even when checkout_coupon_enabled=false (the flag no longer gates the sidebar widget — only gated the old OrderSummary inline input)
[STATE] This is a BEHAVIOR CHANGE from pre-VCST-4896 where the flag hid the coupon UI entirely
[DOM] If widget is HIDDEN when flag=false: this contradicts the PR behavior and should be flagged as a regression or unintended side-effect
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: widget hidden when checkout_coupon_enabled=false (if this occurs, flag as potential regression or undocumented intent), setting change not propagated within 5s, admin setting not found
References: VCST-4896 (behavior change: feature flag scope), MANUAL ADVISORY — confirm intent with PR author

Title: Coupons Sidebar — Applied Coupon Code Visible as Read-Only on Checkout Review Step
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in. Cart has at least 1 item. QA10OFF is applicable to cart. Checkout flow accessible. Theme 2.48.0-pr-2269-cd06 or later deployed. Design Technique: State Transition (cart applied → checkout review step).
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads
[SCROLL] to 'Discount & coupons' widget (.coupons-section)
[ACT] apply QA10OFF via preset card or custom code card
[WAIT] card in applied state (green border, check icon)
[ASSERT] discount line visible in OrderSummary
[ACT] click 'Checkout' or 'Proceed to Checkout'
[WAIT] checkout page loads and progresses to review step
[ASSERT] on review step, locate the applied coupon display
Assertions:
[DOM] checkout review step shows a disabled (read-only) VcActionInput displaying 'QA10OFF' — the applied coupon code is visible but non-editable on the review page (per checkout/review.vue: appliedCouponCode)
[DOM] coupon discount line is present in the checkout order summary (discount carried through from /cart)
[STATE] coupon applied on /cart carries through to checkout review without being reset
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] cart query at checkout review: cart.coupons[0].isAppliedSuccessfully=true; discount matches /cart value
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during cart → checkout navigation
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: coupon code not visible on checkout review (appliedCouponCode missing from review.vue), discount disappears at checkout review, cart.coupons reset on checkout navigation, console TypeError on checkout page
Cleanup: Navigate away without placing order; remove coupon from cart if needed
